task.title: Create Go admin API service skeleton
task.description: Initialize Go project with gRPC server and grpc-gateway for REST API generation

implementation.details: Setup Go module with gRPC dependencies, create protobuf definitions for services, implement basic gRPC server with grpc-gateway REST mapping.

task.acceptance_criteria: gRPC server starts successfully, protobuf compiles, grpc-gateway generates REST endpoints, Docker image builds
